articles.title: Rich Paul: No rush on LeBron decision; teams have done enough - ESPN
articles.description: Rich Paul, the agent for LeBron James, said Monday he does not know when his client will decide what team he'll play for next season. He added that any teams interested in James joining them do not need to do anything else to sway him in the meantime.

articles.title: Julio Rodríguez exits Mariners game with apparent injury - The Seattle Times
articles.description: Julio Rodríguez was removed from Monday’s game before the start of the sixth inning after legging out an infield hit in the previous half inning.

articles.title: Top Blazers official trashes Portland’s draft term sheet: ‘If they don’t want us, then that’s fine’ - OregonLive.com
Guardians' offense enjoys breakout game with 7-homer night - ESPN
articles.description: The Guardians, who came Monday's game with the third-fewest homers in the majors, socked seven of them in a 13-4 rout of the Twins.

articles.title: ESPN reportedly lays off analyst Ryan Clark during broadcast of 'NFL Live' - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Clark became the first high-profile victim of a round of layoffs that is reportedly set to take place on Tuesday, per The Athletic.

articles.title: FIFA investigates Argentina players after on-field brawl following World Cup final - ABC7 Los Angeles
articles.description: FIFA opened an investigation Monday after Spain's celebrations on beating Argentina in the World Cup final took an ugly turn when players briefly clashed on the field.

articles.title: Eli Drinkwitz takes aim at SEC 9-game schedule, cites Big Ten's three straight CFP titles - On3

articles.description: A warmup jacket worn by Wilt Chamberlain during the 1972 NBA finals that was found in an Oregon thrift store fetched over $89,000 in an auction that closed Monday. Nineteen-year-old Portland resident Quinn Brown found the Lakers warmup jacket at a Goodwill. A…

articles.title: Texas man arrested in Hannah Rapp's death has lengthy record - ESPN
articles.description: A Texas man arrested for manslaughter in the death of professional boxer Hannah Rapp has a lengthy arrest history dating back more than a decade, including for reckless driving and hit and run, according to jail records reviewed by ESPN on Monday.

articles.title: New Shohei Ohtani Injury Update as Dodgers Star Shut Down Indefinitely, Has 'Not Gotten Better' - Bleacher Report
articles.description: Los Angeles Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani won't be taking the mound anytime soon.

articles.title: As World Cup ends and SEC football media days begin, the specter of recent Big Ten dominance looms - CNN
articles.description: The Big Ten has won the last three national CFP titles. SEC commissioner Greg Sankey would like to halt the trend.

articles.title: Kentucky football coach channels Curt Cignetti, delivers SEC Media Days quote everyone will remember - Fox News
articles.description: Will Stein delivered a moment reminiscent of Curt Cignetti at SEC Media Days, telling reporters Kentucky football will succeed "because of me."

articles.description: The Golden State Warriors should be very encouraged after their dominant NBA Summer League showing.
